faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Wantagh typically range from $550 to $5,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. A single-room treatment may cost $550–$1,200, while whole-home infestations requiring multiple visits and extensive fabric treatment can reach $3,000–$5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Wantagh properties.

faqs.question: What are the signs of a clothes moth infestation in my Wantagh home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include irregular holes in wool clothing, carpets, or upholstery; silken tubes or cases in closet corners; adult moths flying around bedrooms or closets (especially at night); and a musty odor in storage areas. You may also notice larvae (small cream-colored caterpillars) or shed casings on fabrics. Wantagh's older homes with wool carpeting and cedar closets are particularly vulnerable to infestations.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 2–4 hours depending on the size of your home and extent of infestation. Most Wantagh homes require 2–3 follow-up treatments spaced 2–3 weeks apart to break the moth life cycle and ensure complete elimination. Our technicians will also provide guidance on laundering fabrics, vacuuming, and preventive measures to protect your belongings long-term.

faqs.question: Can clothes moths damage more than just clothing?
faqs.answer: Yes, clothes moths feed on natural fibers including wool, silk, cashmere, fur, feathers, and even blended fabrics containing animal fibers. In Wantagh homes, we commonly find damage to wool carpets, upholstered furniture, curtains, blankets, vintage clothing collections, and stored seasonal items. They can also infest piano felts, taxidermy, and natural fiber rugs, making professional treatment essential to prevent costly damage.
